message.content:
You need to create the following files for a Next.js 14 App Router project at C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaSV13 - Rick. The project uses Tailwind CSS with a dark premium theme (bg-[#0a0a0f], cards bg-[#1a1d21], primary #10b981 emerald), lucide-react icons.

Existing UI components at @/components/ui/card, @/components/ui/button, @/components/ui/badge, @/components/ui/input, @/components/ui/tabs, @/components/ui/modal, @/components/ui/select, @/components/ui/textarea.
Shared components: @/components/page-header (PageHeader), @/components/kpi-card (KpiCard), @/components/progress-bar (ProgressBar).
Mock data at @/lib/mock-data.ts: MOCK_DIRECTORY_ENTRIES, MOCK_AFFILIATE_STATS, MOCK_USER, MOCK_WORKSPACE.
ScoreRing at @/components/ScoreRing (default export).

CREATE THESE FILES:

1. **app/(app)/app/directory/page.tsx** - "use client" page:
   - Search input + industry filter dropdown
   - Grid of directory entry cards showing: name, domain, industry, AEO score with color coding, engines count, verified badge
   - Use MOCK_DIRECTORY_ENTRIES
   - "Rejoindre l'annuaire" CTA button
   - PageHeader: title "Annuaire AEO", description "Decouvrez les entreprises optimisees pour les moteurs IA"

2. **app/(app)/app/directory/[id]/page.tsx** - "use client" page:
   - Back link to /app/directory
   - Entity profile: large ScoreRing, company info, industry badge
   - Category scores (mock 4-5 categories with progress bars)
   - Engine breakdown (5 engines with scores)
   - Use params.id to find entity in MOCK_DIRECTORY_ENTRIES

3. **app/(app)/app/recharge/page.tsx** - "use client" page:
   - Current credits display with progress bar
   - 3 credit packs styled as pricing cards:
     - Jerrican: 100 credits, 9€
     - Pompe: 500 credits, 39€ (highlighted/popular)
     - Citerne: 2000 credits, 129€
   - Each with a "Buy" button that shows a mock success toast after delay
   - PageHeader: title "Recharger", description "Achetez des credits pour vos analyses et generations"

4. **app/(app)/app/affiliation/page.tsx** - "use client" page:
   - 3 tabs: "Vue d'ensemble" / "Filleuls" / "Paiements"
   - Overview tab: KPI cards (total referrals, active, earnings, pending payout), affiliate link with copy button, conversion rate
   - Referrals tab: table/list of referrals from MOCK_AFFILIATE_STATS.referrals
   - Payouts tab: table/list of payouts from MOCK_AFFILIATE_STATS.payouts
   - Use Tabs from @/components/ui/tabs
   - PageHeader: title "Programme d'affiliation", description "Parrainez et gagnez 20% de commission recurente"

5. **app/(app)/app/account/page.tsx** - "use client" page:
   - Profile section: name, email inputs (pre-filled from MOCK_USER)
   - Password change section: current + new + confirm password inputs
   - Notification preferences: toggle switches (email alerts, weekly digest, marketing)
   - Data export section: button to "export my data" (mock)
   - Danger zone: delete account button (mock confirmation)
   - PageHeader: title "Mon compte", description "Gerez votre profil et vos preferences"

IMPORTANT RULES:
- All pages must use "use client" directive
- Use existing UI components from their individual files (e.g., @/components/ui/card not @/components/ui/index)
- Import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent, CardFooter } from "@/components/ui/card"
- Import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" etc
- Import { PageHeader } from "@/components/page-header"
- Use lucide-react for icons
- Wrap pages in div with className "p-4 sm:p-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto"
- Write COMPLETE production-quality code with no TODOs
- Use glass-panel or Card components for sections
- Use toast from "sonner" for feedback
- Mock all actions with setTimeout delays + toast notifications

content.text: I'll create all 5 files for the Next.js 14 App Router project. Let me first check the existing project structure and mock data to ensure compatibility.

"use client"; import React, { useState } from "react"; import { Users, DollarSign, TrendingUp, Clock, Copy, Check, Link2, UserPlus, Wallet, ArrowUpRight, ExternalLink, } from "lucide-react"; import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from "@/components/ui/tabs"; import { PageHeader } from "@/components/page-header"; import { KpiCard } from "@/components/kpi-card"; import { MOCK_AFFILIATE_STATS } from "@/lib/mock-data"; import { toast } from "sonner"; function getStatusBadge(status: string) { switch (status) { case "active": return Actif; case "pending": return En attente; case "paid": return Paye; case "cancelled": return Annule; default: return {status}; } } function formatDate(dateStr: string): string { const date = new Date(dateStr); return date.toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", { day: "numeric", month: "short", year: "numeric", }); } export default function AffiliationPage() { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("overview"); const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false); const stats = MOCK_AFFILIATE_STATS; const handleCopyLink = () => { navigator.clipboard.writeText(stats.affiliateLink).then(() => { setCopied(true); toast.success("Lien d'affiliation copie !"); setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000); }).catch(() => { toast.error("Impossible de copier le lien"); }); }; return (
